notes: This product slice runs on the canonical Forseti site and reuses the shared Forseti QA seat.
Release-active JobHunter features are tracked here so qa-jobhunter can close suite-activation work without relying on the parent suite manifest alone.

suites.label: Contact/referral tracker coverage is live in the parent Forseti suite and ACL manifest
suites.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; feature='forseti-jobhunter-contact-referral-tracker'; suite=Path('qa-suites/products/forseti/suite.json').read_text(); perms=Path('org-chart/sites/forseti.life/qa-permissions.json').read_text(); assert f'\"feature_id\": \"{feature}\"' in suite; assert f'\"feature_id\": \"{feature}\"' in perms; print('PASS')"

suites.label: Interview scheduler QA surfaces are registered and feature-tagged
suites.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; routes=Path('/home/keithaumiller/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/job_hunter/job_hunter.routing.yml').read_text(); app=Path('/home/keithaumiller/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/job_hunter/src/Controller/ApplicationSubmissionController.php').read_text(); twig=Path('/home/keithaumiller/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/job_hunter/templates/my-jobs.html.twig').read_text(); perms=Path('org-chart/sites/forseti.life/qa-permissions.json').read_text(); assert '/jobhunter/interview-rounds/{job_id}/save' in routes; assert 'loadInterviewScheduledBadges' in app; assert 'interview-scheduled' in twig; assert '\"feature_id\": \"forseti-jobhunter-interview-scheduler\"' in perms; print('PASS')"

suites.label: Salary tracker QA surfaces are registered and feature-tagged
suites.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; routes=Path('/home/keithaumiller/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/job_hunter/job_hunter.routing.yml').read_text(); company=Path('/home/keithaumiller/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/job_hunter/src/Controller/CompanyController.php').read_text(); app=Path('/home/keithaumiller/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/job_hunter/src/Controller/ApplicationSubmissionController.php').read_text(); perms=Path('org-chart/sites/forseti.life/qa-permissions.json').read_text(); assert '/jobhunter/jobs/{job_id}/salary-expectation/save' in routes; assert 'salary-delta' in company; assert 'salary-comparison' in app; assert '\"feature_id\": \"forseti-jobhunter-salary-tracker\"' in perms; print('PASS')"

suites.label: Rejection analysis QA surfaces are registered and feature-tagged
suites.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; routes=Path('/home/keithaumiller/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/job_hunter/job_hunter.routing.yml').read_text(); company=Path('/home/keithaumiller/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/job_hunter/src/Controller/CompanyController.php').read_text(); app=Path('/home/keithaumiller/forseti.life/sites/forseti/web/modules/custom/job_hunter/src/Controller/ApplicationSubmissionController.php').read_text(); perms=Path('org-chart/sites/forseti.life/qa-permissions.json').read_text(); assert '/jobhunter/jobs/{job_id}/close' in routes; assert 'rejection_reason' in company; assert 'rejection-reasons' in app; assert 'rejection-stage-chart' in app; assert '\"feature_id\": \"forseti-jobhunter-rejection-analysis\"' in perms; print('PASS')"

suites.label: Resume version labeling coverage is live in the parent Forseti suite and ACL manifest
suites.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; feature='forseti-jobhunter-resume-version-labeling'; suite=Path('qa-suites/products/forseti/suite.json').read_text(); perms=Path('org-chart/sites/forseti.life/qa-permissions.json').read_text(); assert f'\"feature_id\": \"{feature}\"' in suite; assert f'\"feature_id\": \"{feature}\"' in perms; print('PASS')"
